name: Honey Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening with sugar and honey until fluffy.
3. Add 1/2 cup of dry ingredients to the mixture and blend well.
4. Add the beaten egg yolk and melted chocolate; beat thoroughly.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients and liquids (water and sour milk) alternately, blending after each addition.
6. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg white until incorporated.
7. Grease a pan and place in a moderate oven preheated to 350°F.
8. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes.
